metadata.name: cdx_ig_5y_3_7_mezz
metadata.description: Synthetic CDX IG 5Y 3-7 percent mezzanine tranche.
metadata.source_detail: Finstack Quant canonical credit pricing calculation on deterministic synthetic market inputs Phase-2 envelope migration (2026-05-09): Tier-A wrap. Original snapshot preserved verbatim in initial_market; pricing tolerance contract preserved. Re-baselined 2026-06-09 after intentional tranche pricer corrections (2026-06-09 quant review Majors 4-6): accrual-on-default complement fix ((1-f)*dEL), discount-curve-axis relative discounting from as_of, and senior-side recovery amortization of the detachment. Formula self-test goldens track the canonical calculation; tolerance contract unchanged. Re-baselined 2026-07-11 after the seasoned premium-accrual boundary correction.
metadata.regen_command: manual formula fixture; values captured from canonical pricing runner

plan.description: Tier-A wrap (Phase-2 envelope migration, 2026-05-09): the original market snapshot is preserved in initial_market with empty plan.steps. Routes through engine::execute_with_diagnostics without changing pricing math.

npv.tolerance_reason: Formula self-test: tolerance pinned to ~10x the worst observed deterministic FP residual (1.16e-10 abs / 2.8e-11 rel) for canonical pricing on synthetic inputs. Tightening from 1e-6 to 1e-9 catches drift introduced by refactors, FP-contract changes, or algorithm swaps that would otherwise be invisible at the looser band.
